name: Chinese Chicken Salad (Weight Watchers)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Drained canned sliced water chestnuts
8 oz Cooked skinless, boneless chicken breast, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
Adapted from Candlestick Park, San Francisco, CA.
Foodservice: Harry M. Stevens
1. In a small bowl, combine the rice wine vinegar, canola oil, sesame oil, toasted sesame seeds, and ground ginger. Whisk in 1 tablespoon of water; set aside.
2. Divide the torn romaine lettuce, shredded red cabbage, and water chestnuts evenly among 4 plates. Top each plate with chicken strips. Sprinkle sliced almonds over the salad.
3. Drizzle the dressing over the salad and sprinkle with lemon juice.
Each serving provides: 1 FA, 2.5 P, 3 V, 0.5 B, 15 C
Per serving: 208 cal, 21 g pro, 9 g fat, 11 g carb, 56 mg sod, 48 mg chol
